name: SMS Lifesciences India Limited
summary: SMS Lifesciences India Limited researches, develops, manufactures, buys, imports, and sells active pharmaceutical ingredients (API) and its intermediates, organic and inorganic chemicals, and pharmaceuticals in India and internationally. The company offers APIs in various therapeutic areas, such as antiulcer, antifungal, and erectile dysfunction. It also provides consultancy services; and contract manufacturing services for APIs and intermediates. In addition, the company exports its products. The company was founded in 1990 and is based in Hyderabad, India.
